title: Tests, Examples, Fuzzing, Benchmarks, Coverage, and Static Analysis · Language Lens: Fuzz Properties Corpus
summary: A parser passes familiar examples but fails malformed UTF-8, aliases caller memory, and regresses under a dependency update. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go fuzz properties corpus increment in a layered parser quality dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define fuzz properties, seed corpora, bounds, failure minimization, and retained regression inputs.
Choose unit, integration, end-to-end, golden, example, and contract tests with narrow fakes at owned boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
